queries.question: Show me the id and name of the crew members each film used.
queries.sql: SELECT Crew_Members.member_id, Crew_Members.name  from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id   GROUP BY Films_Crew_Members.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Films_Crew_Members.film_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Films)

queries.question: Show me the id and name of the crew members each film used.
queries.sql: select films.title , crew_members.member_id , crew_members.name from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?member_id ?name WHERE {
  ?films_crew_members a :Films_Crew_Members .
  ?crew_members a :Crew_Members .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasCrew_Members ?crew_members .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?crew_members p:member_id ?member_id .
  ?crew_members p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show the ids, roles and names of crew members that are common for all films.
queries.sql: SELECT Crew_Members.member_id, Crew_Members.role, Crew_Members.name  from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id   GROUP BY Films_Crew_Members.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Films_Crew_Members.film_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Films)

queries.question: What crew member IDs are common for every film?
queries.sql: SELECT Crew_Members.member_id  from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id   GROUP BY Films_Crew_Members.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Films_Crew_Members.film_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Films)

queries.question: For each film, what is the related role of each crew member?
queries.sql: select films.title , crew_members.role from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?role WHERE {
  ?films_crew_members a :Films_Crew_Members .
  ?crew_members a :Crew_Members .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasCrew_Members ?crew_members .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?crew_members p:role ?role .
}

queries.question: What are all the crew member IDs present for every film?

queries.question: Provide the role of crew members that is most popular for all films.
queries.sql: SELECT Crew_Members.role  from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id   GROUP BY Films_Crew_Members.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Films_Crew_Members.film_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Films)

queries.question: For each film, provide the corresponding id, role and name of crew members.
queries.sql: select films.title , crew_members.member_id , crew_members.role , crew_members.name from Films_Crew_Members join Crew_Members on Films_Crew_Members.member_id = Crew_Members.member_id join Films on Films_Crew_Members.film_id = Films.film_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?member_id ?role ?name WHERE {
  ?films_crew_members a :Films_Crew_Members .
  ?crew_members a :Crew_Members .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasCrew_Members ?crew_members .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films_crew_members p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?crew_members p:member_id ?member_id .
  ?crew_members p:role ?role .
  ?crew_members p:name ?name .
}
